calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF COURT HEARING (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar May-02-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Elder and Dependent Adult Abuse OSC Hearing this day.
Dept. 514, Judge: Peter J. Bush, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Carol Haraburda #8052,
Plaintiff Beatriz Zambrano present in pro per with Spanish Interpreter Barbara Pinto.
Defendant Jose David Molina present in pro per.
Parties and Interpreter were placed under oath and testified.
Proof of Service is in the file.
The Court hears testimony, receives evidence and after hearing the evidence presented, Plaintiff's request for issuance of a restraining order is GRANTED as follows: Defendant shall stay at least 100 yards away from the protected person(s) Beatriz Aambrano, The Residence, and Vehicles.
Defendant shall not Physically Abuse, Financially Abuse, Intimidate, Molest, Attack, Strike, Stalk, Threaten, Assault (sexually or otherwise), Hit, Harass, Destroy the Personal Property of, or Disturb the peace of the Person.
No Contact, either directly or indirectly, in any way, including, but not limited to, in person, by telephone, in writing, by public or private mail, by interoffice mail, by e-mail, by text message, by fax, or by other electronic means.
Firearm restriction applies.
Expires May 2, 2015
Restraining Order After Hearing was submitted to and signed by the Court.
